ai_summary: Sharmila holds a computer science and engineering degree and is completing a substitute teacher course; she has six years of IT experience and six years as a stay-at-home parent, seeking part-time work within 10 miles of Duluth/Johns Creek. Her conflict resolution style is to stay calm, separate children, and redirect activities, and she aims to leverage her TDI training and parenting experience in the classroom.
